title: TerminationCurrencyAmendment
description: A class to specify the Amendment to Termination Currency elections by the parties to the agreement.

isApplicable.description: The qualification of whether the Amendment to Termination Currency is deemed applicable by the parties (True) or not (False).

effectiveDate.description: The effective date of the Amendment to Termination Currency. This date can be specified as either an actual date, a specific date (e.g. the annex date) or as a custom provision.
